escalateWhen: verifyBeforeNext fails twice on same item after one Composer fix
item touches functions/src/, firestore.rules, or delivery CF logic — Sonnet 4.6 security-review Task before push
T2+ auth/Firestore writes or idempotency changes
scope blocked without listed schema/rules change — mark blocked, do not widen
executionProtocol.instructions: Overnight 2026-07-11 cloud: away-124 harness + away-125 lint. Feature branch + PR only — do not push main or deploy.

queue.title: Harness health: fix verify:pickup post-reseed flake + auth for Scenario A
queue.scope: scripts/verify-pickup-portal.mjs (and helpers if needed only). Fix post-Scenario-B reload flake (SPA same-URL goto / wait) and ensure Scenario A completion can succeed under live Firestore rules (authenticate Playwright context so recordPickupEvent client getDoc is allowed). Run representative harness suite and record pass/fail. Do NOT change product src/, functions/, or firestore.rules.
queue.acceptance: npm run verify:pickup PASS locally; npm run build PASS; harness report artifact or CURRENT_STATE note of suite results.

queue.title: Mechanical ESLint cleanup (safe subset)
queue.scope: Fix mechanical ESLint only: prefer-const, unused vars/imports, no-useless-assignment. SKIP auth/session/token client files and structural react-refresh/only-export-components moves. No behavior changes.
queue.acceptance: npm run build PASS; eslint error count reduced; no auth/session files touched.
